name: Party Time
author: Poki
description: Party Time is a bright and fun obby game where you bounce around a colorful obstacle course. Jump, run, dodge and even change your size to reach the goal! Select your favorite course and pick up a fun outfit while you play. Are you ready to party? How to play Party Time? Move: Use WASD or the arrow keys to walk around Jump: Press space to jump Look around: Move your mouse to see the world Select between different courses with a click of your mouse! Who created Party Time? Party Time is created by PEEPS*. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Party Time for free? You can play Party Time for free on Poki. Can I play Party Time on mobile devices and desktop? Party Time can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
